revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 7 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 7 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月7日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[景行天皇]]40年（[[110年]]_月_日） - [[日本武尊]]が[[伊勢神宮]]で[[倭姫命]]から天叢雲（後の[[草薙剣]]）を賜る
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[安政]]6年（[[1859年]][[11月1日]]） - [[橋本左内]]、[[福井藩]]士（* [[1834年]]） * 安政6年（1859年11月1日） - [[頼三樹三郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士・[[頼山陽]]の子（* [[1825年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月6日 (旧暦)|10月6日]] 翌日[[10月8日 (旧暦)|10月8日]] - 前月[[9月7日 (旧暦)|9月7日]] 翌月[[11月7日 (旧暦)|11月7日]] *新暦[[10月7日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月6日 (旧暦)|10月6日]] 翌日[[10月8日 (旧暦)|10月8日]] - 前月[[9月7日 (旧暦)|9月7日]] 翌月[[11月7日 (旧暦)|11月7日]] *新暦[[10月7日]]
{{stub}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月7日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつなのか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[景行天皇]]40年（[[ユリウス暦]][[110年]][[11月6日]]） - [[ヤマトタケル|日本武尊]]が[[伊勢神宮]]で[[倭姫命]]から[[天叢雲剣]]（後の草薙剣）を賜る
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1538年]][[10月29日]]） - [[足利義明]]、[[小弓公方]]（* [[1487年]]） * [[延宝]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1674年]][[11月4日]]） - [[狩野探幽]]、[[絵師]]（* [[1602年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[11月1日]]） - [[橋本左内]]、[[福井藩]]士（* [[1834年]]） * 安政6年（グレゴリオ暦1859年11月1日） - [[頼三樹三郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士・[[頼山陽]]の子（* [[1825年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月7日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

{{Lunar October}} '''Lunar October7日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつなのか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[景行天皇]]40年（[[ユリウス暦]][[110年]][[11月6日]]） - [[ヤマトタケル|日本武尊]]が[[伊勢神宮]]で[[倭姫命]]から[[天叢雲剣]]（後の草薙剣）を賜る
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1538年]][[10月29日]]） - [[足利義明]]、[[小弓公方]]（* [[1487年]]） * [[延宝]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1674年]][[11月4日]]） - [[狩野探幽]]、[[絵師]]（* [[1602年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[11月1日]]） - [[橋本左内]]、[[福井藩]]士（* [[1834年]]） * 安政6年（グレゴリオ暦1859年11月1日） - [[頼三樹三郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士・[[頼山陽]]の子（* [[1825年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月7日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

revision.text:
'''October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar October}} ''October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar October7-->きゅうれきじゅうがつなのか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[景行天皇]]40年（[[ユリウス暦]][[110年]][[11月6日]]） - [[ヤマトタケル|日本武尊]]が[[伊勢神宮]]で[[倭姫命]]から[[天叢雲剣]]（後の草薙剣）を賜る

== 忌日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1538年]][[10月29日]]） - [[足利義明]]、[[小弓公方]]（* [[1487年]]） * [[延宝]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1674年]][[11月4日]]） - [[狩野探幽]]、[[絵師]]（* [[1602年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[11月1日]]） - [[橋本左内]]、[[福井藩]]士（* [[1834年]]） * 安政6年（グレゴリオ暦1859年11月1日） - [[頼三樹三郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士・[[頼山陽]]の子（* [[1825年]]）

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:仏滅]]

'''October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar October}} ''October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar October7-->きゅうれきじゅうがつなのか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== Events == * [[景行天皇]]40年（[[ユリウス暦]][[110年]][[11月6日]]） - [[ヤマトタケル|日本武尊]]が[[伊勢神宮]]で[[倭姫命]]から[[天叢雲剣]]（後の草薙剣）を賜る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1538年]][[10月29日]]） - [[足利義明]]、[[小弓公方]]（* [[1487年]]） * [[延宝]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1674年]][[11月4日]]） - [[狩野探幽]]、[[絵師]]（* [[1602年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[11月1日]]） - [[橋本左内]]、[[福井藩]]士（* [[1834年]]） * 安政6年（グレゴリオ暦1859年11月1日） - [[頼三樹三郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士・[[頼山陽]]の子（* [[1825年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:10月7日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:仏滅]]

== Births ==

<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar October7-->きゅうれきじゅうがつなのか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の7日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
--> == Events == * [[景行天皇]]40年（[[ユリウス暦]][[110年]][[11月6日]]） - [[ヤマトタケル|日本武尊]]が[[伊勢神宮]]で[[倭姫命]]から[[天叢雲剣]]（後の草薙剣）を賜る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]7年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1538年]][[10月29日]]） - [[足利義明]]、[[小弓公方]]（* [[1487年]]） * [[延宝]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1674年]][[11月4日]]） - [[狩野探幽]]、[[絵師]]（* [[1602年]]） * [[安政]]6年（グレゴリオ暦[[1859年]][[11月1日]]） - [[橋本左内]]、[[福井藩]]士（* [[1834年]]） * 安政6年（グレゴリオ暦1859年11月1日） - [[頼三樹三郎]]、[[尊攘派]]志士・[[頼山陽]]の子（* [[1825年]]）

[[sn:October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初七]] [[zh:十月初七]] [[en:draft:October 7 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * Emperor Keikō's 40th year ( [[November 6]] , 110 in the Julian calendar ) - Emperor [[Yamato Takeru]] receives the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Tsurugi]] (later known as Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi) from {{ill|Wahime-no-mikoto|ja|倭姫命}} at Ise Shrine. == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}7th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}}{{ill|1538|ja|1538}}{{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}}） - {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義明}}、{{ill|Koyumi-kimitokata|ja|小弓公方}}（* {{ill|1487|ja|1487}}） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}}{{ill|1674|ja|1674}}{{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}}） - {{ill|Kano Tan’yū|ja|狩野探幽}}、{{ill|Painter|ja|絵師}}（* {{ill|1602|ja|1602}}） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}}{{ill|1859|ja|1859}}{{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}） - {{ill|Hashimoto Zennai|ja|橋本左内}}、{{ill|Fukui Domain|ja|福井藩}}士（* {{ill|1834|ja|1834}}） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}}1859年{{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}） - {{ill|Yorimizu Saburosaburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}}、{{ill|Sonzōha|ja|尊攘派}}志士・{{ill|Yoriyama|ja|頼山陽}}の子（* {{ill|1825|ja|1825}}） == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007}}

[[sn:October 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初七]] [[zh:十月初七]] [[en:draft:October 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * Emperor Keikō's 40th year ( [[November 6]] , 110 in the Julian calendar ) - Emperor [[Yamato Takeru]] receives the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Tsurugi]] (later known as Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi) from {{ill|Wahime-no-mikoto|ja|倭姫命}} at Ise Shrine. == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 7th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1538|ja|1538}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） - {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義明}} 、{{ill|Koyumi-kimitokata|ja|小弓公方}} （* {{ill|1487|ja|1487}} ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1674|ja|1674}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） - {{ill|Kano Tan’yū|ja|狩野探幽}} 、{{ill|Painter|ja|絵師}} （* {{ill|1602|ja|1602}} ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Hashimoto Zennai|ja|橋本左内}} 、{{ill|Fukui Domain|ja|福井藩}} 士（* {{ill|1834|ja|1834}} ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1859年{{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Yorimizu Saburosaburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} 、{{ill|Sonzōha|ja|尊攘派}} 志士・{{ill|Yoriyama|ja|頼山陽}} の子（* {{ill|1825|ja|1825}} ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * Emperor Keikō's 40th year ( [[November 6]] , 110 in the Julian calendar ) - Emperor [[Yamato Takeru]] receives the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Tsurugi]] (later known as Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi) from {{ill|Wahime-no-mikoto|ja|倭姫命}} at Ise Shrine. == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 7th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1538|ja|1538}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） - {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義明}} 、{{ill|Koyumi-kimitokata|ja|小弓公方}} （* {{ill|1487|ja|1487}} ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1674|ja|1674}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） - {{ill|Kano Tan’yū|ja|狩野探幽}} 、{{ill|Painter|ja|絵師}} （* {{ill|1602|ja|1602}} ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Hashimoto Zennai|ja|橋本左内}} 、{{ill|Fukui Domain|ja|福井藩}} 士（* {{ill|1834|ja|1834}} ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1859年{{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Yorimizu Saburosaburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} 、{{ill|Sonzōha|ja|尊攘派}} 志士・{{ill|Yoriyama|ja|頼山陽}} の子（* {{ill|1825|ja|1825}} ） == See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * Emperor Keikō's 40th year ( [[November 6]] , 110 in the Julian calendar ) - Emperor [[Yamato Takeru]] receives the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Tsurugi]] (later known as Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi) from {{ill|Wahime-no-mikoto|ja|倭姫命}} at Ise Shrine. == Births ==

[[sn:October 7 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月7日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 7일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初七]] [[zh:十月初七]] [[en:draft:October 7 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * Emperor Keikō's 40th year ( [[November 6]] , 110 in the Julian calendar ) - Emperor [[Yamato Takeru]] receives the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Tsurugi]] (later known as Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi) from {{ill|Wahime-no-mikoto|ja|倭姫命}} at Ise Shrine. == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 7th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1538|ja|1538}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） - {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義明}} 、{{ill|Koyumi-kimitokata|ja|小弓公方}} （* {{ill|1487|ja|1487}} ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1674|ja|1674}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） - {{ill|Kano Tan’yū|ja|狩野探幽}} 、{{ill|Painter|ja|絵師}} （* {{ill|1602|ja|1602}} ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Hashimoto Zennai|ja|橋本左内}} 、{{ill|Fukui Domain|ja|福井藩}} 士（* {{ill|1834|ja|1834}} ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1859th year {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Yorimizu Saburosaburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} 、{{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction}} 志士・{{ill|Yoriyama|ja|頼山陽}} の子（* {{ill|1825|ja|1825}} ）

revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初七]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * Emperor Keikō's 40th year ( [[November 6]] , 110 in the Julian calendar ) - Emperor [[Yamato Takeru]] receives the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Tsurugi]] (later known as Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi) from {{ill|Wahime-no-mikoto|ja|倭姫命}} at Ise Shrine. == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 7th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1538|ja|1538}} {{ill|October 29|ja|10月29日}} ） - {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義明}} 、{{ill|Koyumi-kimitokata|ja|小弓公方}} （* {{ill|1487|ja|1487}} ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1674|ja|1674}} {{ill|November 4|ja|11月4日}} ） - {{ill|Kano Tan’yū|ja|狩野探幽}} 、{{ill|Painter|ja|絵師}} （* {{ill|1602|ja|1602}} ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1859|ja|1859}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Hashimoto Zennai|ja|橋本左内}} 、{{ill|Fukui Domain|ja|福井藩}} 士（* {{ill|1834|ja|1834}} ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1859th year {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ） - {{ill|Yorimizu Saburosaburō|ja|頼三樹三郎}} 、{{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction}} 志士・{{ill|Yoriyama|ja|頼山陽}} の子（* {{ill|1825|ja|1825}} ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|6|10|8|9|7|11|10|1007}}
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初七]]
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初七]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初七]][[zh:十月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840398]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 7|qq=October 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * Emperor Keikō's 40th year ( [[:en:November 6|November 6]] , 110 in the Julian calendar ) - Emperor [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]] receives the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Tsurugi]] (later known as Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi) from [[:en:Yamatohime-no-mikoto|Wahime-no-mikoto]] at Ise Shrine. == Births == == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 7th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1538|1538]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義明|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636811}} 、{{ill|Koyumi-kimitokata|ja|小弓公方|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyumi-kimitokata|1=Oyumi kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460758}} （* [[:en:1487|1487]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1674|1674]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） - [[:en:Kanō Tan'yū|Kano Tan’yū]] 、{{ill|Painter|ja|絵師|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Painter|1=Painter|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11606851}} （* [[:en:1602|1602]] ） * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Zennai]] 、[[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] 士（* [[:en:1834|1834]] ） * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1859th year [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - {{ill|Yorimizu Saburosaburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburosaburō|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} 、{{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 志士・[[:en:Rai San'yō|Yoriyama]] の子（* [[:en:1825|1825]] ）

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * Emperor Keikō's 40th year ( [[:en:November 6|November 6]] , 110 in the Julian calendar ) - Emperor [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]] receives the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Tsurugi]] (later known as Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi) from [[:en:Yamatohime-no-mikoto|Wahime-no-mikoto]] at Ise Shrine. == Births == == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 7th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1538|1538]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636811}} 、{{ill|Koyumi-kimitokata|ja|小弓公方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyumi-kimitokata|1=Oyumi kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460758}} （* [[:en:1487|1487]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1674|1674]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） - [[:en:Kanō Tan'yū|Kano Tan’yū]] 、{{ill|Painter|ja|絵師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Painter|1=Painter|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11606851}} （* [[:en:1602|1602]] ） * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Zennai]] 、[[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] 士（* [[:en:1834|1834]] ） * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1859th year [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - {{ill|Yorimizu Saburosaburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburosaburō|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} 、{{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 志士・[[:en:Rai San'yō|Yoriyama]] の子（* [[:en:1825|1825]] ）

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初七]][[zh:十月初七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840398]] Wikidata name: 7th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 7|qq=October 7}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * Emperor Keikō's 40th year ( [[:en:November 6|November 6]] , 110 in the Julian calendar ) - Emperor [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]] receives the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Tsurugi]] (later known as Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi) from [[:en:Yamatohime-no-mikoto|Wahime-no-mikoto]] at Ise Shrine. == Births == == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 7th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1538|1538]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636811}} 、{{ill|Koyumi-kimitokata|ja|小弓公方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyumi-kimitokata|1=Oyumi kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460758}} （* [[:en:1487|1487]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1674|1674]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） - [[:en:Kanō Tan'yū|Kano Tan’yū]] 、{{ill|Painter|ja|絵師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Painter|1=Painter|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11606851}} （* [[:en:1602|1602]] ） * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Zennai]] 、[[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] 士（* [[:en:1834|1834]] ） * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1859th year [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - {{ill|Yorimizu Saburosaburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburosaburō|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} 、{{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 志士・[[:en:Rai San'yō|Yoriyama]] の子（* [[:en:1825|1825]] ）

== Events == * Emperor Keikō's 40th year ( [[:en:November 6|November 6]] , 110 in the Julian calendar ) - Emperor [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]] receives the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Tsurugi]] (later known as Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi) from [[:en:Yamatohime-no-mikoto|Wahime-no-mikoto]] at Ise Shrine. == Births == == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 7th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1538|1538]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636811}} 、{{ill|Koyumi-kimitokata|ja|小弓公方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyumi-kimitokata|1=Oyumi kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460758}} （* [[:en:1487|1487]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1674|1674]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） - [[:en:Kanō Tan'yū|Kano Tan’yū]] 、{{ill|Painter|ja|絵師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Painter|1=Painter|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11606851}} （* [[:en:1602|1602]] ） * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Zennai]] 、[[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] 士（* [[:en:1834|1834]] ） * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1859th year [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - {{ill|Yorimizu Saburosaburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburosaburō|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} 、{{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 志士・[[:en:Rai San'yō|Yoriyama]] の子（* [[:en:1825|1825]] ）

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * Emperor Keikō's 40th year ( [[:en:November 6|November 6]] , 110 in the Julian calendar ) - Emperor [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]] receives the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Tsurugi]] (later known as Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi) from [[:en:Yamatohime-no-mikoto|Wahime-no-mikoto]] at Ise Shrine. == Births == == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 7th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1538|1538]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636811}} 、{{ill|Koyumi-kimitokata|ja|小弓公方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyumi-kimitokata|1=Oyumi kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460758}} （* [[:en:1487|1487]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1674|1674]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） - [[:en:Kanō Tan'yū|Kano Tan’yū]] 、{{ill|Painter|ja|絵師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Painter|1=Painter|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11606851}} （* [[:en:1602|1602]] ） * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Zennai]] 、[[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] 士（* [[:en:1834|1834]] ） * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1859th year [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - {{ill|Yorimizu Saburosaburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburosaburō|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} 、{{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 志士・[[:en:Rai San'yō|Yoriyama]] の子（* [[:en:1825|1825]] ）

== Events == * Emperor Keikō's 40th year ( [[:en:November 6|November 6]] , 110 in the Julian calendar ) - Emperor [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]] receives the sword [[Kusanagi no Tsurugi|Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Tsurugi]] (later known as Kusanagi-no-Tsurugi) from [[:en:Yamatohime-no-mikoto|Wahime-no-mikoto]] at Ise Shrine. == Births == == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 7th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1538|1538]] [[:en:October 29|October 29]] ） - {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636811}} 、{{ill|Koyumi-kimitokata|ja|小弓公方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyumi-kimitokata|1=Oyumi kubō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11460758}} （* [[:en:1487|1487]] ） * [[:en:Enpō|Enpō]] 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1674|1674]] [[:en:November 4|November 4]] ） - [[:en:Kanō Tan'yū|Kano Tan’yū]] 、{{ill|Painter|ja|絵師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Painter|1=Painter|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11606851}} （* [[:en:1602|1602]] ） * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1859|1859]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Zennai]] 、[[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] 士（* [[:en:1834|1834]] ） * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 6th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1859th year [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ） - {{ill|Yorimizu Saburosaburō|ja|頼三樹三郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yorimizu Saburosaburō|1=Rai Mikisaburō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6565903}} 、{{ill|Sonzōha|ja|Sonnō jōi faction|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonzōha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 志士・[[:en:Rai San'yō|Yoriyama]] の子（* [[:en:1825|1825]] ）
